hookassetloader-desc: Short description shown on Special:Version. JS/CSS is intentionally written this way because the extension loads both JavaScript and CSS assets.
hookassetloader-error-missing: Error displayed when the parser tag has no module/name attribute or the supplied asset name fails validation.
hookassetloader-error-unknown: Error displayed when a requested asset name is valid but not present and enabled in the registry page. $1 is the normalized asset name.
hookassetloader-error-empty: Error displayed when a requested asset is approved but no matching MediaWiki namespace CSS or JavaScript page exists. $1 is the normalized asset name.
hookassetloader-permission-denied: Permission error displayed when a user without the hookassetloader-manage right attempts to edit, create, delete, move, protect, or submit a controlled HookAssetLoader page.
